suite.name: Search Booking Uat

kw.name: Open Browser และ Login ตามวิดีโอ
Open Browser
kw.msg: Opening browser 'chrome' to base url 'http://localhost:3001/login'.
kw.doc: Opens a new browser instance to the optional ``url``.

kw.name: Maximize Browser Window
kw.doc: Maximizes current browser window.

kw.name: Wait Until Page Contains
kw.arg: เข้าสู่ระบบ
kw.doc: Waits until ``text`` appears on the current page.

kw.name: Go To
kw.msg: Opening url 'http://localhost:3001/login'
kw.doc: Navigates the current browser window to the provided ``url``.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.msg: Typing text 'oonchira44' into text field 'id=identifier'.
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Input Password
kw.msg: Typing password into text field 'id=password'.
Temporally setting log level to: NONE
kw.doc: Types the given password into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Click Button
kw.msg: Clicking button 'xpath=//button[@type='submit']'.
kw.doc: Clicks the button identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Wait Until Page Contains
kw.arg: ค้นหาเส้นทาง
kw.doc: Waits until ``text`` appears on the current page.

kw.name: ไปหน้าค้นหาผ่าน Navbar
Click Element
kw.msg: Clicking element 'xpath=//a[contains(text(),'ค้นหาเส้นทาง')]'.
kw.arg: xpath=//a[contains(text(),'ค้นหาเส้นทาง')]
kw.doc: Click the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Wait Until Page Contains
kw.arg: ค้นหาเส้นทาง
kw.doc: Waits until ``text`` appears on the current page.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.msg: Typing text 'โรงเรียนชุมแพ' into text field 'xpath=//input[@placeholder='เช่น กรุงเทพฯ']'.
kw.arg: xpath=//input[@placeholder='เช่น กรุงเทพฯ']
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.msg: Typing text 'ศูนย์วิจัยข้าวชุมแพ' into text field 'xpath=//input[@placeholder='เช่น เชียงใหม่']'.
kw.arg: xpath=//input[@placeholder='เช่น เชียงใหม่']
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Execute Javascript
kw.msg: Executing JavaScript: document.querySelector('input[type="date"]').value = '2026-03-15' Without any arguments.
kw.doc: Executes the given JavaScript code with possible arguments.

kw.name: Execute Javascript
kw.msg: Executing JavaScript: document.querySelector('input[type="date"]').dispatchEvent(new Event('input')) Without any arguments.
kw.doc: Executes the given JavaScript code with possible arguments.

kw.name: Click Button
kw.msg: Clicking button 'xpath=//button[contains(text(),'ค้นหา')]'.
kw.doc: Clicks the button identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Reload Page
kw.doc: Simulates user reloading page.

kw.name: Click Button
kw.msg: Clicking button 'xpath=//button[contains(text(),'ค้นหา')]'.
kw.doc: Clicks the button identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Wait Until Page Contains
kw.arg: ผลการค้นหา
kw.doc: Waits until ``text`` appears on the current page.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.msg: Typing text 'โรงเรียนชุมแพ' into text field 'xpath=//input[@placeholder='เช่น กรุงเทพฯ']'.
kw.arg: xpath=//input[@placeholder='เช่น กรุงเทพฯ']

kw.name: Input Text
kw.msg: Typing text 'ศูนย์วิจัยข้าวชุมแพ' into text field 'xpath=//input[@placeholder='เช่น เชียงใหม่']'.
kw.arg: xpath=//input[@placeholder='เช่น เชียงใหม่']
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Execute Javascript
kw.msg: Executing JavaScript: document.querySelector('input[type="date"]').value = '2099-01-01' Without any arguments.
kw.doc: Executes the given JavaScript code with possible arguments.

kw.name: Execute Javascript
kw.msg: Executing JavaScript: document.querySelector('input[type="date"]').dispatchEvent(new Event('input')) Without any arguments.
kw.doc: Executes the given JavaScript code with possible arguments.

kw.name: Click Button
kw.msg: Clicking button 'xpath=//button[contains(text(),'ค้นหา')]'.
kw.doc: Clicks the button identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Wait Until Page Contains
kw.doc: Waits until ``text`` appears on the current page.

test.name: TC04_Radius_Fail_Pickup_Too_Far

kw.msg: Typing text 'บึงแก่นนคร ขอนแก่น' into text field 'xpath=(//input[@placeholder='พิมพ์ชื่อสถานที่...'])[1]'.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.msg: Typing text 'หมูกระทะริมคลอง ชุมแพ' into text field 'xpath=(//input[@placeholder='พิมพ์ชื่อสถานที่...'])[2]'.

kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Sleep
kw.msg: Slept 1 second.
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.name: Click Button
kw.msg: Clicking button 'xpath=//button[contains(@class,'bg-blue-600') and contains(text(),'ยืนยันการจอง')]'.

test.name: TC07_Validation_Empty_Fields

kw.name: Clear Element Text
kw.arg: xpath=(//input[@placeholder='พิมพ์ชื่อสถานที่...'])[1]
kw.doc: Clears the value of the text-input-element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Clear Element Text
kw.arg: xpath=(//input[@placeholder='พิมพ์ชื่อสถานที่...'])[2]
kw.doc: Clears the value of the text-input-element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Verify Warning Toast
Wait Until Page Contains
kw.doc: Waits until ``text`` appears on the current page.

kw.arg: กรุณาเลือกจุดขึ้นรถและจุดลงรถ

test.doc: ล้างข้อมูลพิกัดใน Modal แล้วกดจอง (ต้องขึ้น Warning)

test.name: TC08_Validation_Modal_Behavior

kw.name: Page Should Contain
kw.msg: Current page contains text 'ยืนยันการจอง'.
kw.arg: ยืนยันการจอง
kw.doc: Verifies that current page contains ``text``.

kw.name: Click Element
kw.msg: Clicking element 'xpath=//button[contains(text(),'ยกเลิก')]'.
kw.doc: Click the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Sleep
kw.msg: Slept 1 second.
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

test.doc: ตรวจสอบว่า Modal จองยังอยู่ และกดปิดเพื่อเริ่มเคสถัดไป

test.name: TC09_Booking_Success_Happy_Path

kw.name: Wait Until Location Contains
kw.doc: Waits until the current URL contains ``expected``.

test.doc: กรอกข้อมูลถูกต้อง -> จองสำเร็จ

kw.name: Close All Browsers
kw.doc: Closes all open browsers and resets the browser cache.

suite.doc: UAT Test Suite: ระบบค้นหาและจองเส้นทาง
